message:
test: add real plugin integration tests, fix 4 spec issues

Test all 5 official Anthropic plugins (superpowers, security-guidance,
code-simplifier, agent-sdk-dev, plugin-dev) exercising: manifest parsing,
skill discovery, agent discovery, hook parsing, hook execution, tool name
mapping, prompt formatting, settings, and multi-plugin aggregation.

Fixes found by real-plugin testing:
- Agent color and model fields are now optional (default: inherit/blue)
- Exit code 2 hooks use stderr for messages (not stdout)
- SessionStart match target is "startup" per Claude Code convention
- hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext extracted as system message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
